title: oreocharis hekouensis
intro: Oreocharis hekouensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae, commonly known as the orchid-flowered toothwort. The plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in China, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Oreocharis hekouensis include its potential to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used as a decoction or infusion, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
